chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-7333 of 2017 Syed Tasaveer Hussain Shah Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 9252/23 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 12.04.2023 Mr. Tahir Hasan Qureshi for petitioner. -.-.- 1) Urgency granted. 2) Learned counsel, on instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge
